description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the perl:5.14 Docker image. Include a before_script that runs `curl -L https://cpanmin.us | perl - App::cpanminus`, then `cpanm Carton` and `carton install`. Cache the directories `local/` and `/usr/lib/perl/`. Define a single stage called build and a job named job1 in that stage that executes `carton bundle`. No services, artifacts, or special rules are needed.
